title: Hosty catalog entry (marketplace.0.2)
description: One app's membership entry. Metadata and pointers only — the app's manifest, feeds, and artifact live in the author's own repo/registry; the catalog never contains app code.

id.description: Reverse-DNS app id. Must match Hosty Core's app id rule and equal the folder name under apps/.

name.description: Display name for the storefront card. Falls back to the id when omitted.

license.description: SPDX license expression for the app's source (e.g. MIT, Apache-2.0, AGPL-3.0-only, or a compound such as "MIT OR Apache-2.0" or "GPL-2.0-or-later WITH Classpath-exception-2.0"). Storefront metadata; the authoritative license text lives in the app's own repository.

icon.description: Icon: a repo-relative asset path (e.g. assets/icon.svg, rewritten to an absolute URL at publish) or an absolute https URL.

descriptionUrl.description: Absolute URL to a markdown long-description, generated at publish by vendoring the manifest's catalogMetadata.descriptionFile. Not hand-authored — the storefront emits it; a hand-written entry omits it.

feedsUrl.description: Absolute https URL to the app repository's feeds.json (app-feeds.0.1). The app owns its update feeds — named pointers at moving manifest refs — so the entry changes only when the feed document moves, never per release. Core fetches and validates this document at install/update time; the catalog never embeds feeds.

signerIdentity.description: Trust anchor a signed feed must match (verified once signing lands). Informational until then.
